programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: The Skeleton's Compass
programme.desc: A group of middle school friends go on the hunt for treasure after finding a skeleton in the woods.

programme.title: Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon
programme.desc: Moana meets Brave with the hit new animation Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon. The story of a young girl who was born and grew up in the deepest jungle of the Amazon.

programme.title: A Unicorn Adventure
programme.desc: If your father is a legendary explorer and adventurer who charts the lost corners of the world, what do you do when he goes missing? If you're Mo and Melody, the children of Charles Willard, you literally follow in his footsteps and try to track him down.

programme.title: Rabbit Academy
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit meets Monsters University in the exciting, animated feature Rabbit Academy. This vibrant and colourful family adventure follows Max, the first city rabbit to be chosen in the master class for Easter Rabbits.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E 2: Mission Impawsible
programme.desc: In this sequel, the super intelligent artificial robotronic dog, Archie, befriends Gregory, a young boy who is the son of a carnival owner. Gregory is concerned that someone has been stealing from the carnival and enlists his new friend to help find the culprit.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Everything is running smoothly for popular radio DJ Dr. Emma Lloyd in the run up to her own wedding when she makes the shocking discovery: she's already married – and to someone else!

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Safety Not Guaranteed
programme.desc: An intern at a Seattle magazine jumps at the chance to investigate the author of a classified ad seeking someone to travel back in time with.

programme.title: Friends with Money
programme.desc: Three well-heeled married women and their single, financially challenged friend negotiate the waters of friendship, relationships, careers and money.

programme.title: The Keeper
programme.desc: A policeman turned bodyguard has to save a billionaire's daughter that he was hired to protect. Starring Steven Seagal (2009).

programme.title: CONTRACT TO KILL
programme.desc: A CIA agent has to stop Islamic terrorists from teaming up with Mexican cartels to smuggle weapons of mass destruction into the U.S.

programme.title: Killing Salazar
programme.desc: Six U.S. agents have to protect a key witness in a major drug case from being murdered by the drug dealers he is going to testify against. Starring Luke Goss and Steven Seagal (2016).

programme.title: A Dangerous Man
programme.desc: A newly released prisoner becomes embroiled in a street war between the police and Chinese drug dealers. Starring Steven Seagal (2009).

programme.title: The Keeper
programme.desc: A policeman turned bodyguard has to save a billionaire's daughter that he was hired to protect. Starring Steven Seagal (2009).

programme.title: Robot Overlords
programme.desc: The adults lost the war and now the kids must save the world! Robots rule the streets and the people are locked in their homes. Stepping outside risks being vaporised by a hulking Sentry or picked off by a lethal Sniper.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: An uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the sexy and outgoing widow (Sofia Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen.

programme.title: A Hologram for the King
programme.desc: A Hologram for the King follows businessman Alan Clay (Tom Hanks) on a journey halfway around the world, far from his American roots, to a rising Saudi Arabian city.

programme.title: Mr. Brooks
programme.desc: Consider Mr. Brooks: A successful businessman, generous philanthropist, loving husband and father, a true pillar of the community. He's seemingly perfect. Nonetheless, Mr. Brooks harbors a sinister secret: he's an insatiable serial killer, so lethally clever that no one has ever suspected him...

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a Double Bill: Legends of countless riches lie ahead as Quartermain and his crew of explorers encounter thrilling twists and turns deep down in King Solomon's mines.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a Double Bill: Legends of countless riches lie ahead as Quartermain and his crew of explorers encounter thrilling twists and turns deep down in King Solomon's mines.

programme.title: June Again
programme.desc: During a fleeting bout of lucidity from her dementia, June Wilton has precious little time to bring together her estranged children, save the family business, and rekindle an old flame.

programme.title: June Again
programme.desc: During a fleeting bout of lucidity from her dementia, June Wilton has precious little time to bring together her estranged children, save the family business, and rekindle an old flame.

programme.title: Swarmed
programme.desc: The residents of a small town find themselves battling a swarm of hornets which has been sprayed by a super pesticide.

programme.title: Swarmed
programme.desc: The residents of a small town find themselves battling a swarm of hornets which has been sprayed by a super pesticide.

programme.title: The Man Without A Face
programme.desc: Chuck wants to leave home but can't make the grade for boarding school. Then, he finds out the disfigured recluse (Mel Gibson, "Braveheart") living nearby is an ex-teacher.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Rebel in the Rye
programme.desc: The life of celebrated but reclusive author, J.D. Salinger, who gained worldwide fame with the publication of his novel, "The Catcher in the Rye".

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port of Call New Orleans
programme.desc: A detective addicted to pain meds investigates the murder of a drug-involved family.

programme.title: Septembers of Shiraz
programme.desc: A Jewish family in Iran find their lives turned upside down with the onslaught of revolution.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Nine criminals are placed on an island. Only the last person alive in 30 hours leaves the island.

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port of Call New Orleans
programme.desc: A detective addicted to pain meds investigates the murder of a drug-involved family.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: Deadly Target
programme.desc: When Special Operative James Webster (Michael Jai White, The Dark Knight, Blood and Bone) returns home from duty to find his brother brutally murdered, his lethal training immediately kicks in. Fuelled by rage and a burning need to avenge his brother, he sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and nothing is going to stand in his way... As he delves deeper to identify the murderers, he finds himself at the centre of a deadly conspiracy and a secret world of corruption one which cuts deep inside the U.S. Government, reaching the very highest levels of command. With a ruthless military assassin (Steve Austin, The Expendables) hot on his trail, Webster must expose the corrupt high-ranking officials before he becomes another victim to the very plot which killed his brother.

programme.title: There Are Monsters
programme.desc: There Are Monsters is a feature length horror based upon the apocalyptic premise that the world is being taken over - slowly, quietly and efficiently - by creatures that look exactly like us. The story follows a graduate-student film crew who, on a work-related road trip, discover evidence of these doppelgangers.

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: About Time meets The Time Travellers Wife in this coming-of-age sci-fi romance. If you could turn back time, could you win back the love of your life? When physics genius Stillman (Asa Butterfield) is dumped by his girlfriend Debbie (Sophie Turner), he creates a time machine and with his wing-man Evan (Skyler Gisondo) sets off to right every wrong. But some mistakes are too perfect to fix.

programme.title: The Operative
programme.desc: Munich meets Homeland in this pacy psychological thriller, based on the hit novel The English Teacher by Yiftach R. Atir. Rachel (Diane Kruger, Inglourious Basterds), a rogue spy from Israel's feared national intelligence force vanishes. Following a cryptic phone call, her former handler Thomas (Martin Freeman, The Hobbit Trilogy) must retrace her steps to uncover the threats that lie ahead.

programme.title: Rubikon
programme.desc: All they can do is watch as the world burns. The emergence of an extinction event on Earth leaves the inhabitants of a space station in horror, as they witness the end of humanity unfold before their very eyes. Does the crew risk their lives to get back home during the global catastrophe and search for survivors or remain safe and watch as life as they know it comes to an end?

programme.title: The Escort
programme.desc: Sophisticated and sassy, this lively rom-com promises to give you a good time! LA journalist, Mitch is single, broke, and addicted to sex. While in search for a fresh story, he meets the gorgeous Natalie, a Stanford University educated escort. She agrees to let desperate Mitch shadow her for a magazine expos. But things get complicated when the unlikely pair catch feelings!

programme.title: South Beach Love
programme.desc: (2021) Rom-com with William Levy and Taylor Cole. Cuban cooks and ex partners go head to head at rival parties. Will old flames reignite or will it be a recipe for disaster?

programme.title: Love Strikes Twice
programme.desc: A woman is hit by a car while on her way to drop off divorce papers. When she wakes up without any memory, her husband is determined to recapture her heart. Stars Katrina Begin, Tilky Jones (2017)

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Sophie goes on vacation to recharge and detox from her city life. Michael is a single dad and owner of her rental. Will his life be tempting enough to leave her city life behind (2020)

programme.title: One Summer
programme.desc: (2021) Romance with Sam Page. A man takes his son and daughter to his late wife's hometown. He soon realises that visions of the past could be pointing to a bright new future.

programme.title: Raise a Glass to Love
programme.desc: An aspiring Master Sommelier Jenna returns to her family vineyard and is fascinated by the natural methods of the new winemaker. Starring Laura Osnes (2021)

programme.title: The Beauty Of Love
programme.desc: Emma has a lifestyle website that she puts her heart and soul into called “Classically Emma”. But when her numbers start trending down, she thinks she might've found her fix in a partnership with an ambitious millennial named Jill who has her own dreams.

programme.title: A Snapshot of Forever
programme.desc: After leaving her big city life behind, wedding photographer Jessie Brookes is happier than ever. When famous actor Nate Brown shows up on her parent's vineyard for his sister's wedding, she quickly realizes that there is more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Listen Out for Love
programme.desc: Peyton Pepper, a goal-driven podcast producer, is forced to mold Alex McKinney, a brash loose cannon, into her next star and create the perfect show to save both of their careers. That show comes in the form of finding Peyton's iconic idol, true love.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: When Jack and Amanda head off on a glamping trip to "reignite their spark", their blissful romantic getaway is rudely hijacked and they are left in more trouble than before!

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: For The Love Of Grace
programme.desc: After Grace Harding is saved from a fire by Steve Lockwood, a widowed firefighter, they teach each other to embrace life as they fall in love.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can't refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Shunning
programme.desc: All her life Katie Lapp has longed for the forbidden things, but will her dreams come at a price too dear to pay? Why would Katie's mother, a plain and simple Amish-woman who embraces the old ways, hide a beautiful satin baby dress in the attic? The staggering answers come on the eve of Katie's wedding to widower, Bishop John Beiler, with the arrival of a beautiful “Englisher” woman who has been searching for her, throwing Katie's life – present and future – into confusion.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: Quest For Love
programme.desc: Mackenzie travels to Costa Rica for work. Her best friend Ethan comes along to get romantic inspiration for his action /adventure novel. Mackenzie has loved Ethan for a long time, but he only sees her as a friend--until a tourist named Lucas makes Ethan see Mackenzie in a new light.

programme.title: The Beautiful Beast
programme.desc: The classic Beauty and the Beast tale told with a twist! Isabelle is all beauty - on the outside. When she gets lost on a skiing vacation, she is helped by Jeremy, a man hiding from the world and his past. He's the first person to put Isabelle in her place, and Isabelle realizes she might be more beast than she wants to admit. Through Jeremy's influence she begins to change - and fall in love.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: V. C. Andrews' cult classic Lifetime Movie siblings hide post father's death.

programme.title: Death Saved My Life
programme.desc: Jade (Meagan Good) appears perfect but her life is far from idyllic behind doors.

programme.title: Into the Arms of Danger
programme.desc: A combative phone call with her mom, Laura, results in 17-year-old Jenny.

programme.title: Husbands Gone Wrong

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic

programme.desc: Laura Paddington is overcome with joy when her daughter, Zoe, returns to her after being abducted 17 years before--but is Zoe really her long lost child?

programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.desc: A trio of friends break into the house of a wealthy blind man, thinking they 'll get away with the perfect heist. They 're wrong.

programme.desc: Young computer hacker Lisbeth Salander and journalist Mikael Blomkvist find themselves caught in a web of spies, cybercriminals and corrupt government officials.

programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.desc: The Ark is a retelling of the biblical story of Noah and The Ark. Noah, a farmer and family man, is instructed by an angel to build an ark in the middle of a desert in order to save both his family and the faithful from a devastating flood.

programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.desc: After falling in love in Paris, Marina and Neil come to Oklahoma, where problems arise. Their church's Spanish-born pastor struggles with his faith, while Neil encounters a woman from his childhood.

programme.desc: The attempted assassination of the president is told from five different perspectives.

programme.desc: Born To Race is the story of Danny Krueger, a rebellious young street racer on a collision course with trouble. After an accident at an illegal street race, he is sent to a small town to live with his estranged father, a washed up NASCAR racer.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A group of competitors participates in a wild, illegal car race across America, where the drivers use every dirty trick in the book to win.
